steps.description: In the "Input volume" section, select the CT volume for processing.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, create a new segmentation as "bone_segmentation".

sub_operations.description: Switch to Segment Editor module and create a new segmentation named 'bone_segmentation'

operation_descriptions: Switch to Segment Editor module and create a new segmentation named 'bone_segmentation'

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Add" button to add a new segment as "bone_segment".

sub_operations.description: Add a new segment named 'bone_segment' inside the segmentation

operation_descriptions: Add a new segment named 'bone_segment' inside the segmentation

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Threshold" button.

sub_operations.description: Activate the Threshold effect in Segment Editor

operation_descriptions: Activate the Threshold effect in Segment Editor

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, adjust the threshold slider to set the segmentation range.

sub_operations.description: Set the threshold range for bone segmentation
sub_operations.question: Set the threshold range for bone segmentation

choice_info.question: Set the threshold range for bone segmentation

ui_guidance.title: Set the threshold range for bone segmentation

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Apply" button.
In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Islands" button.

sub_operations.description: Activate the Islands effect in Segment Editor

operation_descriptions: Activate the Islands effect in Segment Editor

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, select the "Split islands to segments" option.

sub_operations.description: Select the 'Split islands to segments' option within Islands effect

ui_guidance.title: Select the 'Split islands to segments' option

operation_descriptions: Select the 'Split islands to segments' option within Islands effect

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Apply" button.
In the "Reference segment (fixed)" section, select the reference segment node.

sub_operations.description: Select the fixed reference segmentation node
sub_operations.question: Select the fixed reference segmentation node

choice_info.question: Select the fixed reference segmentation node

ui_guidance.title: Select the fixed reference segmentation node
ui_guidance.instruction: Select the reference segment from the list.

sub_operations.description: Reconstruct 3D model from the reference segmentation

steps.description: In the "Moving segment (repositioned)" section, select the moving segmentation node.

ui_guidance.title: Select the moving segmentation node
ui_guidance.instruction: Select the moving segment from the list.

sub_operations.description: Reconstruct 3D model from the moving segmentation
Detect fracture surfaces from the reference and moving model
Plan fracture reduction by running registration and creating output transform

steps.description: If further adjustments are required, check the "Manually adjust the moving fragment" box. If not, stop here.

sub_operations.description: Ask if manual adjustment of moving fragment is needed; if not, stop workflow
sub_operations.question: Further adjustments required?

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust the moving fragment by translating/rotating its transform

ui_guidance.title: Adjust the 3D view
ui_guidance.instruction: Rotate and zoom to get a clear view of the moving fragment.

steps.description: Click the "Harden transform into moving fragment" button.

sub_operations.description: Harden the transform into the moving fragment model

ui_guidance.title: Click the 'Harden transform into moving fragment' button
